episode.title: Koko and Boingy 🐸 Boingy's Rainy Song | English Bedtime Story | Koko's Forest Adventure
episode.description:
Join Koko the squirrel and Boingy the frog as they celebrate joy and friendship in the rain! 

🌧️ In this episode, Boingy loves singing in the rain, but nobody wants to join him. When Koko hears his lonely song, she grabs a leaf umbrella and joins in. Soon all the forest animals come out to play, and the rain becomes a magical party!

✨ Moral: Happiness grows bigger when you share it with a friend.

📚 VOCABULARY:
🌧️ Rain (雨 - yǔ)
🤝 Share (分享 - fēnxiǎng)
🎵 Sing (唱歌 - chànggē)

🎯 Perfect for:
✓ English learners (bilingual story)
✓ Bedtime & relaxation
✓ Social-emotional learning
✓ Kids ages 3-8

💚 Subscribe for more bilingual bedtime stories!

#KokosForestAdventure #EnglishStories #BedtimeStories #BilingualLearning #ChildrensStories
